clusters.justification: These terms robustly co-activate within cortico-limbic architectures dedicated to the generalized generation, processing, and regulation of emotional valences and arousals.
This cluster relies on frontostriatal and dopaminergic pathways specialized for computing expected outcomes, processing rewards, and guiding internally motivated goal-directed behavior.
These concepts systematically recruit the default mode network to support complex, internally constructed representational models of both the subjective self and interpersonal others.
